heading: Livestock trails, watering rights; driveway regulations
label: 273c Livestock trails, watering rights; driveway regulations
text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed as affecting in any way rights of owners and operators of cattle and sheep herds, existing on the date immediately prior to , to trail their herds on traditional courses used by them prior to , and to water their stock, notwithstanding the fact that the lands involving such trails and watering are situated within the park: , That the Secretary may promulgate reasonable regulations providing for the use of such driveways.December 18, 1971December 18, 1971Provided
